body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: Bootstrapped TLS Authentication with Proof of Knowledge (TLS-POK)
Using the Extensible Authentication Protocol (EAP) with Ephemeral Diffie-Hellman over COSE (EDHOC)
Extensible Authentication Protocol (EAP) Using Privacy Pass Token
The eap.arpa. domain and EAP provisioning
